title: Stress analysis for mandibular screw retained full arch prosthesis, all in 4 concept, with different cantilever extension.
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ydpvl","text":" Compare the stress distribution pattern in two different cantilever length in mandibular screw retained prosthesis by computing the distribution of stresses in Bone/implant interface in different zone, magnitude and Direction of force applied using finite element analysis software.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"uqnnn","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: In the control group: Edentulous mandible will be restored with screw retained overdenture by four implants with 10mm cantilever length. In intervention group: Edentulous mandible will be restored with overdentures retained by four implants with 16mm and 20mm cantilever.
